languages.text: "Вашего актерского таланта недостаточно, чтобы отрицать очевидное, Ювенна. Вы предали Себериана".
"Your acting talent is not enough to refute what is plainly obvious, Juvenna. You have betrayed Seberian."
languages.original_text: "Вашего актерского таланта недостаточно, чтобы отрицать очевидное, Ювенна. Вы предали Себериана".

traits.locale_text: "Your acting talent is not enough to refute what is plainly obvious, Juvenna. You have betrayed Seberian."
"Your acting talent is not enough to refute what is plainly obvious, Juvenna. You have betrayed Seberian."
"Your acting talent is not enough to refute what is plainly obvious, Juvenna. You have betrayed Seberian."

languages.text: “尤文娜，你那点演技可推翻不了这明摆着的事实。你背叛了塞贝里安。”
languages.original_text: "Your acting talent is not enough to refute what is plainly obvious, Juvenna. You have betrayed Seberian."

traits.locale_text: “尤文娜，你那点演技可推翻不了这明摆着的事实。你背叛了塞贝里安。”

languages.text: « Vos talents d'actrice ne suffiront pas à réfuter l'évidence, Juvenna. Vous avez trahi Seberian. »
languages.original_text: "Your acting talent is not enough to refute what is plainly obvious, Juvenna. You have betrayed Seberian."

traits.locale_text: « Vos talents d'actrice ne suffiront pas à réfuter l'évidence, Juvenna. Vous avez trahi Seberian. »

languages.text: "Oyunculuk yeteneğin, apaçık ortada olanı çürütmeye yetmiyor Juvenna. Seberian'a ihanet ettin."
languages.original_text: "Your acting talent is not enough to refute what is plainly obvious, Juvenna. You have betrayed Seberian."

traits.locale_text: "Oyunculuk yeteneğin, apaçık ortada olanı çürütmeye yetmiyor Juvenna. Seberian'a ihanet ettin."

languages.text: «Su talento como actriz no basta para desmentir lo evidente, Juvenna. Ha traicionado a Seberian».
languages.original_text: "Your acting talent is not enough to refute what is plainly obvious, Juvenna. You have betrayed Seberian."

traits.locale_text: «Su talento como actriz no basta para desmentir lo evidente, Juvenna. Ha traicionado a Seberian».

languages.text: "Euer schauspielerisches Talent reicht nicht aus, um das Offensichtliche zu widerlegen, Juvenna. Ihr habt Seberian verraten."
languages.original_text: "Your acting talent is not enough to refute what is plainly obvious, Juvenna. You have betrayed Seberian."

traits.locale_text: "Euer schauspielerisches Talent reicht nicht aus, um das Offensichtliche zu widerlegen, Juvenna. Ihr habt Seberian verraten."

languages.text: 「あなたの演技の才能では、明らかな事実に反論することはできません。ユベナ、あなたはセベリアンの裏切り者です」
languages.original_text: "Your acting talent is not enough to refute what is plainly obvious, Juvenna. You have betrayed Seberian."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの演技の才能では、明らかな事実に反論することはできません。ユベナ、あなたはセベリアンの裏切り者です」
